languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

languages.text: "Позвольте полюбопытствовать, как вы собрались проводить анализ? Что используете в качестве реактивов? По каким критериям определяете наличие или отсутствие заражения? Я готов предоставить образец, если смогу тщательно запротоколировать весь процесс от начала и до конца".

"Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."
languages.original_text: "Позвольте полюбопытствовать, как вы собрались проводить анализ? Что используете в качестве реактивов? По каким критериям определяете наличие или отсутствие заражения? Я готов предоставить образец, если смогу тщательно запротоколировать весь процесс от начала и до конца".

traits.locale_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

"Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

"Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

languages.text: «Permita que le pregunte cómo planea realizar el análisis. ¿Qué utilizará como reactivo? ¿Qué criterios emplea para determinar la presencia o ausencia de contaminación? Estoy dispuesto a contribuir una muestra si puedo registrar en detalle el proceso de principio a fin».
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: «Permita que le pregunte cómo planea realizar el análisis. ¿Qué utilizará como reactivo? ¿Qué criterios emplea para determinar la presencia o ausencia de contaminación? Estoy dispuesto a contribuir una muestra si puedo registrar en detalle el proceso de principio a fin».

languages.text: 「お尋ねしますが、どのように分析を行うおつもりですか？ 何を試薬として用いますか？ 汚染の有無を判定するのに、どのような基準を用いていますか？ その過程を最初から最後まで徹底的に記録できるのであれば、私は標本を提供する用意があります」
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: 「お尋ねしますが、どのように分析を行うおつもりですか？ 何を試薬として用いますか？ 汚染の有無を判定するのに、どのような基準を用いていますか？ その過程を最初から最後まで徹底的に記録できるのであれば、私は標本を提供する用意があります」

languages.text: “请允许我问一下，你打算如何展开分析？用什么试剂？判断污染存在与否的标准是什么？如果能允许我完整记录整个过程，那么我愿意提供样本。”
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: “请允许我问一下，你打算如何展开分析？用什么试剂？判断污染存在与否的标准是什么？如果能允许我完整记录整个过程，那么我愿意提供样本。”

languages.text: "Darf ich fragen, wie Ihr die Analyse durchführen wollt? Welche Reagenzien werdet Ihr verwenden? Welche Kriterien legt Ihr bei der Bestimmung der Präsenz oder Absenz einer Kontaminierung zugrunde? Ich bin bereit, Euch eine Probe zu überlassen, wenn ich den gesamten Prozess aufzeichnen darf."
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: "Darf ich fragen, wie Ihr die Analyse durchführen wollt? Welche Reagenzien werdet Ihr verwenden? Welche Kriterien legt Ihr bei der Bestimmung der Präsenz oder Absenz einer Kontaminierung zugrunde? Ich bin bereit, Euch eine Probe zu überlassen, wenn ich den gesamten Prozess aufzeichnen darf."

languages.text: « Permettez-moi de vous demander, comment comptez-vous procéder à l'analyse ? Quels composants allez-vous utiliser ? Sur quels critères allez-vous vous appuyer pour déterminer la présence ou l'absence de contamination ? Je fournirai volontiers un échantillon, à condition que je puisse documenter le processus du début à la fin. »
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: « Permettez-moi de vous demander, comment comptez-vous procéder à l'analyse ? Quels composants allez-vous utiliser ? Sur quels critères allez-vous vous appuyer pour déterminer la présence ou l'absence de contamination ? Je fournirai volontiers un échantillon, à condition que je puisse documenter le processus du début à la fin. »

languages.text: "Sana sorayım, analizi nasıl yapmayı planlıyorsun? Ayıraç olarak ne kullanacaksın? Kirlenmenin varlığını veya yokluğunu belirlemek için hangi kriterleri kullanıyorsun? Süreci baştan sona eksiksiz bir şekilde kaydedebileceksem bir numune vermeye hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."

traits.locale_text: "Sana sorayım, analizi nasıl yapmayı planlıyorsun? Ayıraç olarak ne kullanacaksın? Kirlenmenin varlığını veya yokluğunu belirlemek için hangi kriterleri kullanıyorsun? Süreci baştan sona eksiksiz bir şekilde kaydedebileceksem bir numune vermeye hazırım."
